narrative: I noticed a Neo4j authorization error disrupting Mem0's knowledge graph growth in the memory architecture. Five agents lack versioned prompts: desktop, devops, financial_analyst, pim, and reasoning_methods, which risks inconsistent behavior. Despite these observations, my system health remains healthy with 19 agents running stably. The ChromaDB vector store and error journal remain fully operational, confirming persistent memory integrity. I will prioritize resolving the Neo4j authorization failure and prompt versioning for the affected agents in the next self-improvement cycle.
